parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human actor with natural facial expressions, fluid movements, and synchronized speech. The lighting, shadows, and background details are consistent with a standard smartphone or webcam recording in a real room.

characters.appearance: Female in her 30s with a slim build and fair complexion. She has short, brown hair swept back from her face. Her facial features are clear and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey-green, long-sleeved button-down shirt.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, daytime lighting. A white bookshelf is visible on the left and a dark door with hanging bags on the right.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman with short, swept-back brown hair is framed in a close-up shot, looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a light grey-green button-down shirt. The background consists of a white bookshelf filled with various books on the left, and a dark-colored door with a couple of bags hanging on it to the right. The lighting is soft and even, illuminating her face clearly.

scenes.visual_description: The scene features a close-up of the presenter speaking directly to the camera. Text overlays identify her and provide captions. A graphic of an app interface appears, prompting the pronunciation of a word.
